data.title: CPKC appoints Gordon Trafton as board vice-chair, adding two new members. TSX: CP, NYSE: CP. Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: Today, Canadian Pacific Kansas City (TSX: CP) (NYSE: CP) (CPKC) revealed their latest board changes in Calgary, AB. Gordon Trafton, a CPKC board member, has now taken on the role of vice-chair. This move is part of the company's continuous board succession planning efforts.

data.title: OFN secures $100M bond guarantee for 22Beacon to build charter schools. $1B total origination to date. No cost to taxpayers.
data.description: OFN recently completed a closing that increased their total BGP origination to almost $1 billion. This initiative offers cost-effective long-term funding for educational institutions in rural and struggling areas without any financial burden on taxpayers. The transaction involved OFN and 22Beacon.

data.title: Imperative Care introduces Zoom 4S Catheter for their Zoom Stroke System to enhance ischemic stroke treatment.
data.description: A company based in Campbell, California called Imperative Care has introduced the Zoom 4S Catheter to enhance their Zoom Stroke System for treating ischemic strokes. The new catheter aims to improve the effectiveness of the company's stroke treatment solution.

data.title: Calix reports Q4 2025 financial results, details available on investor relations website. Conference call scheduled for tomorrow.
data.description: Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) has released its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The information is available in a letter to stockholders on the company's investor relations website. Interested parties can access the letter at https://investor-relations.calix.com/. A conference call featuring President and CEO Michael Weening and CFO Cory Sindelar to review these results is scheduled for tomorrow, January.

data.title: Calix authorizes extra $125M for stock repurchase, adding to existing $109.3M total. Repurchases can be made anytime.
data.description: In San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) has disclosed a significant update stating that the board of directors has approved a boost in repurchasing the company's common stock by $125 million within the current stock repurchase plan. This additional authorization supplements the existing common stock repurchase allowance, which stood at $109.3 million by the close of the fourth quarter of 2025. The repurchase program enables the company to periodically buy back shares.

data.title: FICO reports $6.61 per share earnings for first quarter fiscal 2026, with net income of $158.4 million.
data.description: In Bozeman, Montana, FICO, a leading global analytics software company, reported its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026. The GAAP net income for the quarter was $158.4 million, translating to $6.61 per share. This represented a slight increase from the prior year period, which reported net income of $152.5 million, or $6.14 per share. Net cash provided by operating activities during the quarter amounted to $174.1 million, lower than the $194.0 million reported in the same period last year.

data.title: Deluxe Corp. announces Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results online. Conference call at 5pm ET.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Deluxe (NYSE: DLX), a reputable Payments and Data organization, unveiled its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full-year 2025. The comprehensive earnings report is accessible via the company's Investor Relations website at www.investors.deluxe.com. This report will also be submitted to the SEC on a Form 8-K. The company is set to hold an open-access conference call today at 5:00 p.m. ET (4:00 p.m. CT) to review these financial figures.
US Treasury Secretary Bessent defends the DOJ's probe into Powell - CBS News.

data.title: Equifax introduces new solutions for auto dealers, providing employment insights along with consumer credit reports for comprehensive loan assessment.
data.description: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) recently disclosed a new service that provides essential employment details alongside a consumer credit report to enhance the financial analysis in auto loan prequalification and financing procedures. This latest offering aims to furnish a more comprehensive financial overview for individuals seeking auto loans. The service was introduced on Jan. 28, 2026, as part of Equifax's efforts to streamline the lending process and empower consumers with vital data for better financial decision-making.

data.title: The Cheesecake Factory will webcast Q4 fiscal 2025 earnings on Feb 18, 2026, after market close. Conference call at 2:00pm PT.
data.description: In Calabasas Hills, California, The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated (NASDAQ: CAKE) stated it is set to reveal its fourth quarter fiscal 2025 financial results after markets close on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. A conference call to review the outcomes is scheduled for the same day starting at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time. The call will be streamed on the Company's site, investors.thecheesecakefactory.com. For additional details about The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated T, follow the webcast.

data.title: Univest Financial reports 21.5% rise in Q4 earnings per share from 2024.
data.description: In comparison to the fourth quarter of 2024, there has been a substantial rise of 21.5% in earnings per share. This increase showcases significant growth in financial performance over that time period.

data.title: Plexus Corp. reports Q1 results ended Jan 3, 2026 & guidance for Q2 ending Apr 4, 2026. NASDAQ: PLXS.
data.description: Plexus Corp, a company listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol PLXS, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal first quarter concluding on January 3, 2026. They also provided insights into the anticipated outcomes for the fiscal second quarter, set to finish on April 4, 2026.

data.title: Provident Financial Services declares $0.24 quarterly dividend on Feb 27, payable to stockholders on record by Feb 13.
data.description: A financial services company based in Iselin, N.J., announced on January 28, 2026, that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.24 per common share. This dividend is set to be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on February 13, 2026. The company's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PFS.

data.title: EpicQuest Education's FY2025 financial results revealed; provider of education solutions for US, Canada, and UK students.
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, on January 28, 2026, EpicQuest Education Group International Limited (NASDAQ: EEIQ) disclosed its financial outcomes for the twelve months that concluded on September 30, 2025. EpicQuest Education is known for offering holistic education services to both local and international students pursuing higher education in the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom. The company shared an operations update alongside the financial statistics.

data.title: Landmark Bancorp, Inc. sees 44.4% rise in 2025 net earnings, with Q4 net income at $4.7 million and EPS of $0.77.
data.description: Reports a significant 44.4% rise in net earnings for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, alongside a fourth quarter net income of $4.7 million. Diluted earnings per share amount to $0.77 for the same period.

data.title: Origin Bancorp, Inc. reported $29.5 million net income & $0.95 EPS for Q4 2025, with $40.6 million PTPP earnings.
data.description: In Ruston, Louisiana, on January 28, 2026, Origin Bancorp, Inc. (NYSE: OBK) reported quarterly earnings for the period ending December 31, 2025. The company disclosed a net income of $29.5 million, translating to $0.95 diluted earnings per share (EPS). This is a significant increase from the previous quarter which saw a net income of $8.6 million, equating to $0.27 diluted EPS. The pre-tax, pre-provision (PTPP) earnings for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, stood at $40.6 million, lower than the $47.8 million reported for the previous quarter.

data.title: California Water Service Group declared its 324th consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.3350 per share, raising annual dividend by 8% to $1.34 per share.
data.description: In San Jose, California, the California Water Service Group (NYSE:CWT) has marked the start of its Centennial Celebration by announcing its 324th consecutive quarterly dividend. The dividend amounts to $0.3350 per common share and will be paid on February 20, 2026, to stockholders listed as of the closing of business on February 9, 2026. The Board of Directors also revealed plans to raise the annual dividend by 8%, equal to $0.10 per common share, setting it at $1.34. This is a significant increase from the $1.20 annual dividend and $0.04 special dividend distributed in 2025.

data.title: Celestica reports strong Q4 2025 results with revenue and EPS surpassing expectations, raising 2026 outlook.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, the revenue and adjusted earnings per share (EPS) surpassed the upper limits of our projected ranges. As a result, we are revising our annual outlook for 2026 upwards.

data.title: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) reports Q4 earnings, aims to become a DTC-first denim brand. CEO highlights brand elevation.
data.description: In San Francisco, Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on November 30, 2025. The President and CEO, Michelle Gass, highlighted the company's shift towards a direct-to-consumer strategy and focus on establishing themselves as a comprehensive denim lifestyle brand. They reported improvements in operational efficiency, agility, and brand elevation. This strategic approach has positively impacted their performance over the past few years. Specific financial figures and performance metrics were not disclosed in the statement.

data.title: Waterstone Financial, Inc. reported $7.7 million net income or $0.44 per share for Q4 2025, up from $5.2 million Q4 2024, with $1.48 per share for 2025.
data.description: Waterstone Financial, Inc., the holding company for WaterStone Bank based in Wauwatosa, Wisconsin, released its financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company reported a net income of $7.7 million, translating to $0.44 per diluted share. This marks a significant increase from the same quarter in the previous year when net income was $5.2 million, or $0.28 per diluted share. In the preceding quarter, ending September 30, 2025, net income stood at $7.9 million, equivalent to $0.45 per diluted share. For the twelve months ending December 31, 2025, net income per diluted share was reported at $1.48, compared to $1.01 for the twelve months ending December 31, 2024. The positive financial performance indicates growth and stability for Waterstone Financial, Inc.
